articles.author: Shikhar Balwani
articles.title: Asian Stocks to Fall, Oil Climbs with War in Focus: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg
articles.description: Global stocks declined while oil rallied after an attack on tankers in Iraqi waters highlighted the threat to energy infrastructure in the Middle East and stoked concerns of an escalating conflict.
articles.content:
Global stocks declined while oil rallied after an attack on tankers in Iraqi waters highlighted the threat to energy infrastructure in the Middle East and stoked concerns of an escalating conflict.
